case_title: JULAN BRASKAMP VS. RAINBOW DISTRIBUTION LLC, A FOREIGN LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRASKAMP, JULAN AS TO DEFENDANT RAINBOW DISTRIBUTION LLC, A FOREIGN LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
